testcase.name: test_auth_me_without_token_unauthorized
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactor_iteration_39.py:114: in test_auth_me_without_token_unauthorized assert r.status_code in (401, 403) E assert 200 in (401, 403) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_forgot_password
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactor_iteration_39.py:119: in test_forgot_password assert r.status_code == 200, f"{r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: 500: {"detail":"Errore nell'invio dell'email. Riprova."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reset_password_invalid_token_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactor_iteration_39.py:125: in test_reset_password_invalid_token_returns_400 assert r.status_code in (400, 404), f"expected 400/404, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 400/404, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"token":"invalid-token-xyz","new_password":"Brandnew1!"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","code"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"token":"invalid-token-xyz","new_password":"Brandnew1!"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (400, 404) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_account_throwaway_user

failure.message: AssertionError: deleted user can still login: 200 assert 200 == 401 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactor_iteration_39.py:153: in test_delete_account_throwaway_user assert login_after.status_code == 401, \ E AssertionError: deleted user can still login: 200 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_legacy_messages_requires_auth
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactor_iteration_39.py:224: in test_legacy_messages_requires_auth assert r.status_code in (401, 403), f"expected auth-required, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected auth-required, got 404: {"detail":"Utente non trovato"} E assert 404 in (401, 403) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_legacy_messages_send_to_self_succeeds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactor_iteration_39.py:241: in test_legacy_messages_send_to_self_succeeds assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"{r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: 404: {"detail":"Utente non trovato"} E assert 404 in (200, 201) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
